suiteletscript.name: WOTree - Work Order Hierarchy Suitelet
suiteletscript.description: Lists Released Work Orders grouped by createdfrom hierarchy with inline Start Date editing.

scriptcustomfield.label: WOTree: Released Status Internal Value
scriptcustomfield.description: Internal value of the Work Order status field for "Released". Verify with wo_field_discovery_sl.js.

scriptcustomfield.label: WOTree: Assembly Item Search Join ID
scriptcustomfield.description: Search join id used to reach the assembly item's own fields from a Work Order search.

scriptcustomfield.label: WOTree: Planning Item Category Field ID
scriptcustomfield.description: Field id on the Item record for "Planning Item Category". Verify with wo_field_discovery_sl.js.

scriptcustomfield.label: WOTree: Root Work Orders Per Page
scriptcustomfield.description: How many top-level (root) Work Orders to show per page.

scriptcustomfield.label: WOTree: Map/Reduce Script ID
scriptcustomfield.description: Script id of the Map/Reduce script that applies queued Start Date changes.
